label: Rebel Starfighter
prompt_fragments: angular matte grey hull panels
twin rear thruster pods with glowing orange exhaust rings
swept-back delta wings with battle damage along leading edges
scorched heat shields below the nose
opaque dark cockpit canopy
hull number stencilled on the fuselage

label: Imperial Dreadnought
prompt_fragments: slab-sided matte charcoal hull
rows of gun batteries along the flanks
sensor towers rising from the dorsal surface
hull division lines scoring the plating
no chrome or reflective surfaces

label: Goblin War Barge
prompt_fragments: mismatched salvage planking with asymmetric patched hull
iron spike prow ram at the bow
ragged torn canvas sails
dangling lanterns swinging from the rigging
crude iron fittings and exposed rope lashings

label: Steampunk Ironclad
prompt_fragments: black-painted iron hull with riveted plates throughout
two rotating gun turrets fore and aft
brass pressure relief valves along the hull sides
smoke stacks venting dark exhaust
shallow-draft flat-bottomed hull form

label: Hover APC
prompt_fragments: flat-topped matte olive hull
grav-plate emitters on the flat undercarriage
side troop hatches along both flanks
sensor cluster mounted on the roof
no chrome or reflective surfaces

label: Ornithopter
prompt_fragments: articulated brass wing-frames with fabric membrane panels
open cockpit with exposed pilot seat
twin engine pods flanking the fuselage
riveted metal fuselage with visible bolt heads
mechanical linkage rods connecting wing joints

label: Xianxia Cloud Boat
prompt_fragments: carved red lacquer hull with gold script inlay
curved upswept prow with jade phoenix carving
trailing spirit-energy wisps streaming from the stern
cloud-platform base with levitation glow at the underside
ornate wooden railings with golden filigree trim

label: Attack Helicopter
prompt_fragments: matte olive drab airframe with national markings
stub wings with weapon pylons on each side
sensor pod mounted under the nose
opaque dark canopy over tandem cockpit
tail rotor and stabiliser fin at the rear

label: Gothic Funeral Hearse-Coach
prompt_fragments: matte black weathered-timber coachwork, slab-sided hearse body with cracked peeling finish
opaque dark glass casket-viewing panels along both sides
wrought-iron filigree cresting with funerary-urn finials along the roofline
tarnished-silver corner lanterns and a raised driver's box with worn leather seat
tall iron-shod spoked wheels with weathered timber spokes
empty harness shafts extending forward from the bow, deep-crimson moth-eaten velvet drapes behind the panels

label: Cyberpunk Neon Motorcycle
prompt_fragments: low-slung matte-black carbon-fibre frame, aggressive forward rake
neon LED underglow strips along the belly pan, electric blue or magenta
faired front with integrated HUD visor slot at the nose
oversized solid-disc rear wheel, slick tyre with no visible tread
exposed aftermarket engine block with braided coolant lines
corporate sponsor decals scratched and partially peeled off

label: WWII Medium Tank
prompt_fragments: riveted and welded steel hull, olive drab with mud-caked track guards
sloped turret with long 75mm barrel, bore evacuator at muzzle
vision ports and commander's cupola hatch atop the turret
wide steel tracks, each link caked in dried European mud
stowage boxes and spare track links bolted to hull exterior
white star national marking on turret side, paint worn and chipped

label: Dieselpunk Zeppelin
prompt_fragments: battleship-grey riveted aluminium envelope with art-deco geometric panel seams
gondola slung below with wide viewport windows and gun emplacements fore and aft
four engine nacelles with radial piston engines and exposed cowling
mooring lines trailing below the bow, iron cleat fittings along the keel
national insignia stencilled in blood red and black on the tail fin
oil streaks running aft from each engine nacelle along the hull skin

label: Pulp Sci-Fi Rocket Ship
prompt_fragments: finned torpedo-shaped hull in chrome silver with candy red trim stripe
three swept stabiliser fins at the base, each with a thruster bell
clear dome nose cone with pilot seat silhouette visible inside
porthole windows along the fuselage, each rimmed in polished aluminium
nose art painted below the cockpit, mission tally marks alongside
rocket exhaust bell at base, flared and bright

label: Viking Longship
prompt_fragments: low clinker-built hull of overlapping oak strakes, salt-bleached and tar-sealed
carved serpent prow rising high at the bow, weathered and sea-worn
single rectangular sail of undyed linen with red-and-white stripe
oar holes along the gunwale, shield rail with round shields mounted
stepped mast with forestay and backstay lines, all hemp rope
dragon-head stern post mirroring the prow, Norse knotwork at bow

label: Ancient War Chariot
prompt_fragments: lightweight wicker-and-wood platform on two large spoked wheels, bronze axle fittings
draught pole extending forward, yoke for two horses with bronze fittings
open rear standing platform, low curved front screen of wicker
bronze boss and rim on wheel hubs, leather tyre strip nailed to felloe
quiver of arrows and bow case mounted on the side panel
sun-bleached wood, ochre-painted panels with geometric painted border

label: Man-of-War
prompt_fragments: three-masted square-rigged ship, tarred oak hull with gun port stripe in faded colonial red
two gun decks, cannon muzzles protruding from open gun ports along the broadside
figurehead at the bowsprit, carved and gilded though weather-worn
shrouds and ratlines on each mast, sails furled on crossed yards
stern gallery with carved windows, national ensign at the gaff
waterline stain and weed growth on the hull below the wale

label: Frontier Stagecoach
prompt_fragments: boxy wooden coach body on leather thoroughbrace suspension, dark chocolate paint
four iron-shod spoked wheels, trail-dusted and sun-baked
boot at the rear for luggage, canvas roll strapped over the roof rack
driver's box at the front with bench seat and iron footrest
side windows with rolled leather curtains, hinged door with brass fittings
draught pole and double trace chains forward, harness rings worn bright

label: Atompunk Fins Automobile
prompt_fragments: long low-slung body with chrome-outlined tail fins sweeping back from the C-pillar
wraparound windshield, two-tone paint in aqua teal and cream white
bullet nose grille with horizontal chrome bars and central roundel
fender skirts over rear wheels, white-wall tyres on full-chrome hubcaps
rocket nacelle taillights with red lenses, chrome bumper blade rear
radiation-warning diamond decal visible on the dashboard through the windshield

label: WWI Biplane
prompt_fragments: two-bay biplane with fabric-covered spruce frame, khaki drab with national roundel
inline engine with blunt nose cowling, static propeller at front
twin Vickers guns mounted on the cowl ahead of the open cockpit
open cockpit with padded coaming rim, windscreen barely above gun sight level
wire bracing between wing bays, interplane struts of varnished spruce
fixed undercarriage with bungee-cord shock struts, no wheel fairings

label: Irradiated Scrap Rig
prompt_fragments: jury-rigged cab from a pre-war truck, welded scrap-armour panels bolted over the body
oversized off-road tyres mismatched from different eras and manufacturers
ram prow of angle iron and salvaged bumpers welded to the front
cage roll-bar over the cab with spikes and wire lashing at joins
fuel can rack and water drum mount bolted to the flat-bed rear
radiation-bleached paint exposing rust, barely-legible pre-war logo on the door

label: Rain-Slick Sedan
prompt_fragments: long-wheelbase 1940s sedan body, matte charcoal black with chrome brightwork
rounded pontoon fenders, running boards, and white-wall tyres
curved windshield with wiper arc traced in grime, no interior visible
chrome hood ornament and bonnet louvres, bumper guards fore and aft
rain-wet roof and bonnet, gutter water pooling in wheel arches
driver's window partly open, cigarette-smoke implied

label: Armoured War Horse
prompt_fragments: destrier in steel chanfron and crinet, neck armour articulated in overlapping lames
peytral over the chest, flanchards on the flanks, crupper over the rump
heraldic caparison in wool, bright livery colour with lord's device
heavy hooves in iron shoes, feathered fetlocks mud-caked below
barding joints riveted and campaign-worn, bright surfaces dull at edges
saddle of padded leather with high pommel and cantle, iron stirrups
